title: AskEIVA: Customer Service Agent Platform
short_desc: An enterprise-grade, AI-native knowledge platform engineered to automatically ingest, chunk, and index dense marine survey manuals and historical helpdesk tickets into a highly connected GraphRAG ecosystem.
blueprint_title: THE LEAP: PYTHON PROTOTYPE TO ENTERPRISE .NET 10
blueprint_desc: Successfully re-engineered a single-file Python prototype into a strictly decoupled C# Clean Architecture. By separating our core business logic from database boundaries, the system provides strict type-safety and background execution loops across four distinct layers (Domain, Application, Infrastructure with Weaviate vector operations, and a Blazor Interactive Server web interface).
